alerts.name: Tata Consultancy Services
alerts.reason: Significant drop of -3.6% with 2.3x average volume, falling below its 50-day moving average, driven by Accenture's downward revision of FY26 revenue growth guidance signaling weak enterprise technology spending.

alerts.name: Infosys
alerts.reason: Crashed -6.7% with 2.9x average volume, falling below its 50-day moving average, primarily due to Accenture's weak guidance, indicating vulnerability to a prolonged slowdown in discretionary technology spending.

content.summary: The Indian market experienced a broad decline today, snapping a five-day winning streak, primarily due to an IT sector sell-off and weak global cues, leading to genuine sell signals for TCS.NS and INFY.NS driven by Accenture's cautious outlook.
